micro-mind (qwen25-1.5b-instruct @ ctx=8192) — /help for commands
cwd: /Users/mtimpe/Downloads/micro-mind
▸ read_file path="/Users/mtimpe/Downloads/micro-mind/REA"…
  └ ok 0ms 8262 bytes

micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by `qwen25-1.5b-instruct` via `llama-server`. It offers seven tool surfaces: read_file, list_dir, list_files_recursive, grep, write_file, edit_file, and bash. The model is designed to be single-capable at 1.5 B size, with a focus on minimum-RAM operation.

micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by `qwen25-1.5b-instruct` via `llama-server`. It supports reading files and executing commands within the specified directory or the current working directory.
